notes: v1.14.52 - ENTER BUTTON REDESIGN 'DOWNLINK' (scope-locked to the entry-screen hold-to-enter button only; globe/mesh/wordmark/taglines/CAL/layout + the hold-charge JS all FROZEN and untouched). Concept: the button is the terminus where the data-Earth grounds out. LOOK: one machined dark hex - brushed-graphite top-lit bevel plate (single light source = the globe above; specular on the UPPER bevel) under a gold hairline rim. ONE accent = --gold #ffcb45 (Austin/home identity) on rim + core; --cyan only a faint ambient 'online' secondary. The PHANTOM wordmark keeps the spectrum - the button deliberately does NOT compete (no spectrum on the button). IDLE alive-tell: faint gold light-packets pool INTO the core (4 radial-gradient dots drifting inward, staggered/organic - same packet language as the globe mesh, NOT box-shadow) + the core breathes low & slow. PRESS/HOLD: the SVG aperture opens and stored light surges up through the rim/spokes in GOLD, brightness ramping in step with the EXISTING charge - achieved WITHOUT touching the JS: the #pe-portalG gradient stops were swapped to gold and CSS (#boot #pe-seams line{stroke:var(--gold)}) overrides draw()'s setAttribute colors (presentation attrs are lowest CSS priority). BANNED items avoided: no conic rainbow border, no rotating dashed reticle, no sonar/ping. Implementation: CSS layers + restyled static SVG only; all scoped under #boot with the pe-dl-* prefix (.pe-dl-rim/plate/core/pool/fil + @keyframes pe-dl-amb/core/pk1-4/fil); JS hooks (#pe-stage #pe-portal #pe-hole #pe-seams #pe-rim #pe-glab #pe-flash) preserved; entry fires end-to-end (verified boot->app). reduced-motion: static premium hex (no breathe/pool/filament motion). OPTIONAL filament (.pe-dl-fil): a hairline gold downlink rising from the button into the tagline gap - delivered OFF by default, shows only when #boot has the .pe-dl-link flag class (accept/drop at will). Gates: node --check 3/3, main <style> braces 2704/2704, tap target 132px (>=56), zero horizontal overflow, four stamps lockstep v1.14.52, dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF. Render-verified idle/charge/reduced-motion + adversarially reviewed. DEVICE (John, iPhone, close+reopen to clear SW cache): confirm the gold hex reads as the clear primary action, packets pool + core breathes, hold surges gold and enters; the gold core brightness + the optional filament are the tuning dials. STILL PENDING from v1.14.49: the ?cal=1 mesh-node calibration pass.
